---
title: "Teaching and Professional Experience"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Teaching Experience
</h2>

<div style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Aug 2025 – Dec 2026</strong> — Co-Instructor, University of Nebraska–Lincoln
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Co-instructor for <em>ENSC 230 – Energy and the Environment: Economics and Policy</em>.</li>
      <li>Delivered lectures on selected topics and provided academic support to students.</li>
      <li>Designed problem sets and quizzes and held regular office hours.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Mar 2018 – Aug 2023</strong> — Advisor, Pecege Institute (University of São Paulo)
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Advised MBA students in Project Management on thesis development.</li>
      <li>Guided projects on cost analysis, risk management, and economic feasibility.</li>
      <li>Supervised over 200 students.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Mar 2019 – Dec 2019</strong> — Teaching Assistant, University of São Paulo
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Supported undergraduate instruction in <em>Introduction to Economics</em> (B.Sc. in Agronomy).</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Mar 2013 – Jul 2017</strong> — Teaching Assistant, Federal University of Viçosa
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Assisted in Microeconomic Theory (MSc), Mathematical Economics, and Econometrics.</li>
      <li>Supported both undergraduate and graduate instruction.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Professional Experience
</h2>

<div style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Sep 2019 – Aug 2023</strong> — Researcher, CEPEA — University of São Paulo
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Led GDP and labor market analysis for Brazilian agribusiness.</li>
      <li>Coordinated data collection and produced quarterly analytical reports.</li>
      <li>Contributed to Producer Price Index estimation and sectoral price analysis.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <strong>Mar 2018 – Aug 2023</strong> — Associate Professional, Pecege Institute — University of São Paulo
    <ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.8rem 1.2rem;">
      <li>Provided applied economic and financial consulting for MBA projects.</li>
      <li>Produced technical and feasibility reports.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Technical Skills
</h2>

<p style="margin-top:0.8rem; line-height:1.8;">
<strong>Programming:</strong> R, Python, Stata
</p>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
